title: Agentic OS Usage Event (usage.jsonl)
description: JSON schema for a single line in .agents/observability/usage.jsonl

ts.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp of the event

hook.description: The name of the hook generating the event (e.g. pre_commit_gate)

project.description: Absolute path to the project root directory

decision.description: Governance decision made by the guard

command.description: The executed command, redacted and truncated

session.description: The Claude session ID, if available
